offer: For pediatric clinics processing 5–15 patient appointments/week, inefficient tracking causes missed follow-ups. We automate appointment history tracking instead of manual tracking and reporting.
problem: Inability to efficiently track patient appointment history and generate wellness reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for pediatric clinics
Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to pediatric clinics with demo video
Engage in community forums for pediatric clinics
try_it: Let users try appointment tracking and wellness reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing appointment data
One-click export of simple wellness reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
